subcodes.first_line: O thou letter Mím! Hearken unto the Call raised from the Divine Tree that hath been planted upon the Crimson Hill by the Lord of Destiny [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا میم ان استمع الندآء من سدره المغرسه علی کثیب الاحمر من لدن مالک القدر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
